title: Apply solid acrylic two-pack materials to vehicle components
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply solid acrylic two-pack materials to vehicle components demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.3 Identify tools, equipment and chemicals required for refinishing activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.3 Identify tools, equipment and chemicals required for refinishing activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.3 Identify tools, equipment and chemicals required for refinishing activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Carry out application activities

pcs.text: Mix and apply two-pack materials according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications, industry standards and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements 2.2 Dry materials according to workplace procedures2.3 Check paint finish against manufacturers specifications2.4 Remove paint surface faults using compounds, polishes and glazes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Mix and apply two-pack materials according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications, industry standards and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements 2.2 Dry materials according to workplace procedures2.3 Check paint finish against manufacturers specifications2.4 Remove paint surface faults using compounds, polishes and glazes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Mix and apply two-pack materials according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications, industry standards and workplace health and safety and environmental requirements 2.2 Dry materials according to workplace procedures2.3 Check paint finish against manufacturers specifications2.4 Remove paint surface faults using compounds, polishes and glazes.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out application activities

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete work processes
